name: smartinvoicexyz-subgraph
description: A Graph Protocol subgraph for indexing and querying Smart Invoice events across multiple blockchain networks.

scripts.deploy-base: yarn prepare-base && yarn codegen && yarn build && yarn deploy-goldsky-base
scripts.deploy-fork: yarn codegen && yarn build && graph create --node http://localhost:8020 SmartInvoiceFactoryVersion06 && graph deploy SmartInvoiceFactoryVersion06 --debug-fork QmNPv6LWg9tFtLf4BaXTHGE34vUFaFHAgsUznnC8XXmMdu --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --node http://localhost:8020
scripts.deploy-full-graph-base: yarn prepare-base && yarn codegen && yarn build && yarn deploy-graph-base
scripts.deploy-full-graph-mainnet: yarn prepare-mainnet && yarn codegen && yarn build && yarn deploy-graph-mainnet
scripts.deploy-mainnet: yarn prepare-mainnet && yarn codegen && yarn build && yarn deploy-goldsky-mainnet
